title: euphorbia lansingii
intro: Euphorbia lansingii is a succulent plant species native to Southern Africa, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of a milky latex containing euphorbon, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and combating infections. Euphorbia lansingii is often prepared as a herbal remedy by extracting the latex, which is then used to create tinctures, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use.
